creator: ndewing@experts-exchange.com
text:
I've updated sysutils/rubygem-chef from 0.10.8 to 10.12.  The preceding 0 was dropped from the version number.  

I've updated the gem dependencies in the port as well as preformed a little clean up.

Fix: Apply the patch to the current ports tree.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: The port was out of date with current stable version of the gem.
